Off Calendar Sep-30-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David A. Delbon, of Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3800, for defendants;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Authorize Release Of Mental Health Records; Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Or His Counsel For Unjustified Refusal To Authorize Release Of All Available Mental Health Records is granted. Plaintiffs ordered to pay defendant sanctions in the amount of $3,000., payable within ten days of the Notice of Entry of Order. Order signed. Off Calendar Mar-27-2015 Continued To May-06-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Deputy City Attorney REBECCA A. BERS, Tel No. (415) 554-4224 appearing for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

Parties agree to continue this matter due to Plaintiff not having had summons issued in time to notice Defendant. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: Plaintiff Fermin Rodriguez's Petition For Relief From Government Code Claim Requirement is continued to Wednesday, May 6, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. The Court instructs parties to provide the Court with courtesy copies of their papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
